title: Demo Builder Block Libraries Schema
description: Schema for defining EDS block libraries with package associations and source repositories

libraries.description: Array of block libraries (e.g., demo-team-blocks, isle5, buildright-blocks)

id.description: Unique identifier for the library (lowercase, hyphen-separated)

description.description: Description of what the library provides

type.description: Library type: 'standalone' for independent block repos, 'storefront' for blocks extracted from a storefront repo

stackTypes.description: Stack frontend types this library is compatible with (e.g., 'eds-storefront')

nativeForPackages.description: Package IDs for which this library is native (always included, not shown as optional)

onlyForPackages.description: If set, this library is only available for these package IDs (pinned/exclusive)

default.description: Whether this library should be pre-selected by default for non-native packages
